controller_model: Autopilot Digital CO2 Controller Fuzzy Logic (APCECOD)

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot Digital CO2 Controller Fuzzy Logic (APCECOD)
compatible_devices.notes: Standard ON/OFF CO2 mode works with gas generators. Fuzzy Logic mode CANNOT be used with CO2 generators — manufacturer explicitly prohibits this. Also has a 12VDC input jack to receive a disable signal from an environmental controller (e.g. Autopilot APCETHD) to halt CO2 injection when exhaust fans run.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot Digital CO2 Controller Fuzzy Logic (APCECOD)
compatible_devices.notes: Titan Controls Ares gas generators work in standard ON/OFF mode only. Fuzzy Logic mode not available with any gas-burning generator. Titan Controls 120V CO2 solenoid regulator (for compressed CO2 tanks) is fully compatible including Fuzzy Logic mode.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot Digital CO2 Controller Fuzzy Logic (APCECOD)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Titan Controls CO2 Regulator, CO2Meter.com regulator, any 120V solenoid regulator
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Fuzzy Logic CO2 optimization (compressed CO2 solenoid systems only)
compatible_devices.notes: Compressed CO2 tank + 120V solenoid regulator: FULL compatibility including Fuzzy Logic mode. Gas-burning CO2 generators (any brand): standard ON/OFF mode ONLY — Fuzzy Logic strictly prohibited by manufacturer. Rating reflects lowest common denominator across device types.
